codeReview.summary: Reviewed both diffs for this feature (original fix commit 26631b94 and follow-up fix commit 10d7435d). 26631b94 enforces unsupported workflow hard-fail pre-execution and updates VAL-DAEMON-008 failure-path tests, and 10d7435d resolves the prior blocking issue by replacing lingering OpenBurnBar* test filter snippets in mission-core-worker SKILL.md with BurnBar* filters aligned to .factory/services.yaml.

summary: Fix review passes. The previously failing SKILL filter alignment issue is corrected in commit 10d7435d, and combined with the earlier 26631b94 changes, the feature now satisfies hard-fail unsupported workflow validation, failure/no-run test coverage intent, BurnBar* SKILL command alignment, and handoff commitId traceability guidance.
